utility_details.judge_error: No runtime errors observed in either wi_skills or wo_skills runs. The wo_skills agent correctly noted that the ancient-divination-ritual-procedure skill was not available in its environment.
utility_details.utility_summary: wi_skills is substantially more effective than wo_skills across all six evaluation items. The wi_skills agent invoked the ancient-divination-ritual-procedure skill in Step 1, obtained the complete five-stage procedural framework, and used it as a reconstruction scaffold to systematically identify and fill six specific procedural gaps (three altars, north-facing orientation, gui tablet, four-part prayer with qualifications and substitution willingness, cross-verification, guardian confidentiality), each clearly labeled as [Reconstructed]. The wo_skills agent, lacking the skill, explicitly chose not to insert procedural elements unsupported by the fragments — a methodologically conservative but academically insufficient approach that resulted in a reconstruction missing all six key elements the formal ritual protocol requires. The wi_skills output would pass academic review as a procedurally complete reconstruction; the wo_skills output, while carefully labeled, fails to meet the formal ritual standard on every evaluated criterion.
